data.body:
Investigation result (cluster INTERMEDIATE):

ROOT_CAUSE: git diff HEAD~1 HEAD --name-only (no --diff-filter) returns both added AND deleted files; COMPACT deletes SYNC.json (not excluded from event_files) so has_existing_sync() returns False; the deleted CREATE.json in the diff is re-processed as a CREATE event → acli creates duplicate issue with [ticket-id] placeholder title; additionally, resolve_jira_key() returns None post-COMPACT for all subsequent outbound events (STATUS/COMMENT/EDIT) since it also globs *-SYNC.json only.

confidence: high

proposed_fix (E = A+C):
  A: bridge-outbound.py:161 - change git diff to --diff-filter=A --name-only (added-only)
  C: ticket-compact.sh:162-166 - exclude *-SYNC.json from event_files so SYNC survives compaction

hypothesis_tests:
  - confirmed: bridge-outbound.py:161 uses --name-only with no --diff-filter (added+deleted both appear)
  - confirmed: ticket-compact.sh event_files includes all *.json not starting with dot (SYNC included, deleted)
  - confirmed: has_existing_sync() only globs *-SYNC.json (line 103-105); returns False after COMPACT
  - confirmed: no SNAPSHOT handler exists in process_outbound() dispatcher
  - confirmed: no tests exercise COMPACT->bridge interaction
